1: This means the person takes criticism deeply to heart while not believing compliments at all. Find any strong quality in their matrix (3 or more digits in a single cell) — it is precisely through this quality that the person needs to build up their self-esteem.
2: This means the person takes criticism deeply to heart while not believing compliments at all. Find any strong quality in their matrix (3 or more digits in a single cell) — it is precisely through this quality that the person needs to build up their self-esteem.
3: The person reacts to criticism in a balanced way and, when making decisions, relies solely on their own judgement. (See the exception regarding ones.)
4: The person reacts to criticism in a balanced way and, when making decisions, relies solely on their own judgement. (See the exception regarding ones.)
5: The person reacts to criticism in a balanced way and, when making decisions, relies solely on their own judgement. (See the exception regarding ones.)
6:
The person loves being the centre of attention. They hold heightened expectations of the people around them. Yet it should be understood that inflated self-esteem is really low self-esteem clad in armour. Even though inflated self-esteem is not the norm, such a person has a greater chance of achieving something.
Exceptions: We base the main interpretation of self-esteem on the number of digits in the first column, but pay attention to the number of ones.
